title: MURPH PREP · WEEK 3
meta: WFWHF · Sat, May 2 · Murph Prep Wk 3
yesterday: Yesterday: Core & Spine (Fri) + full rest overnight

exs.name: Easy 400m Run (NO vest)
exs.cue: Nasal breathing, loosen the hips, no effort — this is just blood flow

exs.name: Dead Hang
exs.cue: Full passive hang — decompress, grip warms up, shoulder packing cue

exs.name: Air Squat Flow
exs.cue: Pause at bottom, full depth, arms out for balance — prime knees and hips

exs.name: Scap Pull-Up
exs.cue: Start dead hang, pack the shoulder blades DOWN before any elbow bend — pure scap activation

exs.name: Pull-Up Clusters (3+2 method, NO vest)
exs.target: 6 clusters — 3 reps, 20s rest, 2 reps per cluster
exs.cue: Full dead hang between reps, chest to bar, no kipping — mirror Murph partitioned reps (5/round). Track total reps completed.

exs.name: Lat Pulldown Burn (wide pronated grip)
exs.cue: Elbows drive DOWN and BACK, not just back. Keep chest tall. Volume flusher — not a strength set.

exs.name: Push-Up Density Sets (NO vest)
exs.target: 4 rounds × max clean reps — stop at 20 or when form breaks
exs.cue: Chest to floor, full lockout, zero snake hips. Stop the set the moment form slips — quality mirrors Murph. Log reps per round.

exs.name: Air Squat Density Sets (NO vest)
exs.cue: Full depth, knees track toes, arms forward for balance. Breathe at the top of each rep. Practice Murph squat economy — not speed.

blocks.label: SIM FINISHER - FULL 50/100/150 (WITH VEST)
blocks.rounds: 10 rounds x 5/10/15 - WITH VEST - track total time

ss.label: ROTATING ROUNDS - VEST ON
ss.rest: as needed between rounds - keep moving
ss.ar: Walk between exercises if needed — no sitting

exs.name: Pull-Ups WITH VEST
exs.target: 5 reps per round x 10 rounds = 50 total
exs.cue: 5 reps, then straight to push-ups. Full dead hang each rep. If grip fails mid-round, shake out and finish the 5 before moving on. Use ROUNDS counter to track.

exs.name: Push-Ups WITH VEST
exs.target: 10 reps per round x 10 rounds = 100 total
exs.cue: 10 reps, chest to floor, full lockout. Straight to squats after. No snaking. Drop to knees if form breaks.

exs.name: Air Squats WITH VEST
exs.target: 15 reps per round x 10 rounds = 150 total
exs.cue: 15 reps, full depth, then back to pull-ups for next round. Breathe at the top. Squats are your active rest between upper body movements.

exs.name: Session Notes
exs.target: Log: total time, any rest taken, which round got hard
exs.cue: Record total sim time. Note when grip started failing and which round you had to break. This is your Week 3 benchmark.
